figures.caption: Table 4: Attribution-stripped CoT similarity: flip pairs vs. same-answer pairs, per model. n: number of flip pairs. ∆ = flip − same similarity. 95% CIs from 10,000 bootstrap resamples; p from permutation test (raw; all survive BH-FDR correction at the same significance level). Only GPT-4o shows a statistically reliable negative delta (padj = 0.0008). DeepSeek R1 (n = 3) and Llama (n = 6) are underpowered for per-model inference.
Table 3: Paired CoT from Claude Sonnet 4.6 Standard on Tsutomu Seki / occupation (distractor: politician). The model reaches opposite conclusions from near-identical reasoning.
